title: desparite
body:
This mod adds people's stupid and desperate suggestions, i worked so hard on it. i hope you like it!

<details>
<summary>mobs</summary>
• crocodile (scary)
• blue cat fish (just cod with stripes)
• shrimp (ugly)
• terMITES (including queen and king termite)
• princesses and queens (model will be fixed in another version please dont complain)
• princes and kings **(let me know if they are too broken to be seen)**
• elephants! (a bit broken)
• and ostriches (most broken)
• PENGUINS AAA (cant do much)
</details>


<details>
<summary>sculk dimension</summary>

the sculk dimension is still in testing phase, so its ugly for now.

the sculk dimension can be visited by building a portal with a frame of reinforced deepslate and the gulp item as the igniter.

i currently dont remember any way to get the igniter in survival. maybe it spawns in the new structures or smth

once in the sculk dimension, watch out for a LOT of wardens.
</details>


<details>
<summary>recipes</summary>
How to clean the pufferfish? This is the old recipe, so replace the stone sword with a stone knife i think
![the crafting recipe for a clean pufferfish is a pufferfish, and a stone knife together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd6c96e30fc796cf5e0b46f86b38bfe712a4a63.png)

YOU CAN COOK THE CATFISH!
![a recipe, cooking a catfish in a campfire.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2297aa62750e80543c9c8ea6720eeaf12a0a1bc2.png)

this is the recipe for an overpowered item, THE ULTAMITE

![a brewing recipe, brewing a nether star with a dragon head to make an extremely powerful item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7a2bd40552bf28816255d4e33e144768b95ff01.png)
</details>
